title: Thévenin Equivalent Circuit
description: 5-stage interactive MicroSim demonstrating Thévenin's theorem: replacing a complex circuit with a voltage source in series with a resistance that behaves identically at output terminals.
subject: Electrical Engineering / Circuit Analysis
learningObjective: Students will explain how any linear circuit can be represented by a simple Thévenin equivalent (Vth in series with Rth) that produces identical terminal behavior for any load.
author: AI Circuits Course
